metadata.description: Honey (I Shrunk the AI) — write less code and say less about it.

plugins.name: honey
plugins.description: Three reflexive levers that cut agent token cost — less code (YAGNI/stdlib-first), less prose, denser agent-to-agent handoffs (ESON/compact-JSON) — plus on-demand satellites (review, eco, gain, compress) and a hive of read-only subagents. Auto-intensity lite/full/ultra; safety-critical paths stay exact.
